response.justification: Candidate is a senior full-stack web/cloud developer with no demonstrated experience in embedded firmware, LAN-switch products, or network security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal). C is not listed in current skills (only old NI LabWindows/CVI work from 2014-2015), and there is no Linux kernel modification experience. Critically, the role requires native-level Japanese proficiency, which the candidate does not have (only English, Romanian, basic German). This is a hard disqualifier independent of technical fit.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and testing focus
Polyglot developer with exposure to low-level languages (C/C++ at National Instruments, DLang)
Linux familiarity and some hardware-adjacent work (robotic arms, sound position server)
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency — hard requirement for the role
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, or network security domain experience (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP)
No Linux kernel source modification or chip-vendor SDK experience; primary recent stack is web/cloud, not embedded C
